summary: Completed testing of Telegram bot management features and footer addition. All 16 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend tests pass. Features verified: Telegram bot CRUD endpoints (GET/PUT/DELETE), webhook handling (/start command), staff calls and orders work without bot configured, footer 'Made by Knyazev' with MK logo visible in both admin and client pages.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/telegram-bot requires auth (returns 401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/telegram-bot with auth returns bot_token, bot_info, webhook_set, subscribers
Backend: PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/telegram-bot with invalid token returns 400 with validation error
Backend: PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/telegram-bot with empty token is accepted (clears bot)
Backend: DELETE /api/restaurants/{id}/telegram-bot disconnects bot and clears token
Backend: DELETE /api/restaurants/{id}/telegram-bot requires auth
Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook/{restaurant_id} is public (no auth required)
Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook/{restaurant_id} handles /start command
Backend: POST /api/telegram/webhook/{restaurant_id} handles empty message gracefully
Backend: POST /api/public/staff-calls works without bot configured (no error)
Backend: POST /api/public/staff-calls with call_type_id returns call_type_name
Backend: POST /api/public/orders works without bot configured (no error)
Backend: POST /api/public/staff-calls with invalid table returns 404
Backend: POST /api/public/orders with invalid table returns 404
Frontend: Telegram-бот nav item visible in admin sidebar with Bot icon
Frontend: Admin footer shows 'MK' logo and 'Made by Knyazev' text
Frontend: /admin/telegram-bot page loads with token input field
Frontend: 'Подключить' button visible on Telegram bot page
Frontend: BotFather instructions visible on Telegram bot page
Frontend: Client menu page (/menu/{tableCode}) shows footer with 'MK Made by Knyazev'
seed_data_creation: Used existing restaurant 'Мята Спортивная Тест' (aa25189d-d668-4838-915a-c5d936547f3f) and table code 697DCAA5
context_for_next_testing_agent: Telegram bot features fully implemented. All CRUD endpoints work: GET returns bot_token/bot_info/webhook_set/subscribers, PUT validates token with Telegram API and returns 400 for invalid tokens, DELETE clears token and subscribers. Webhook endpoint POST /api/telegram/webhook/{restaurant_id} is PUBLIC. notify_restaurant_telegram helper sends messages to all subscribers. Staff calls and orders trigger notifications when bot is configured (tested without bot - no errors). Footer 'Made by Knyazev' with MK logo added to AdminLayout and ClientMenuPage.

telegram_bot_management.get_endpoint: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/telegram-bot - returns bot_token, bot_info, webhook_set, subscribers
telegram_bot_management.put_endpoint: PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/telegram-bot - validates token with Telegram API, returns 400 for invalid

footer.admin_footer: AdminLayout shows 'MK Made by Knyazev' in footer
footer.client_footer: ClientMenuPage shows 'MK Made by Knyazev' footer after restaurant info

telegram_bot_page.nav_item: Telegram-бот with Bot icon in sidebar
telegram_bot_page.features: Token input, 'Подключить' button, BotFather instructions, subscribers list (when connected)
